The path

Every brand enters the world differently. Some need to see it first. Some are ready to build. Some want to own it entirely. The path starts wherever you are.

The Character Brief
The idea made visible.

See your brand rendered in the QI world — a mood board and narrative blueprint that makes the story real before you commit to anything more. Delivered in 48 hours.

$99
48 hours · Entry
Begin here
The Origin Short
One character. One world. One film.

A 60–90 second AI-cinematic short that shows exactly what your brand looks like in motion — your character, your world, alive on screen. Proof of concept before the full build.

$500
1 week · Starter production
Your $500 applies toward the Story Engine.
Start the short
Most chosen
The Story Engine
100 assets. One world. Built once, runs for months.

A world your content lives in. 100 character-consistent assets — posts, captions, video scripts, story arcs, visual direction. Built once, running for months. Your character does the talking. The world is yours to keep.

$2,500
3 weeks · One-time · No retainer
Build the engine
Launch — Campaign
Your world, announced.

A full launch campaign built around your character — cinematic shorts, a content calendar, paid ad creative, and email sequence. All in-world. All character-consistent.

$5,000
6 weeks · Done-with-you
Talk launch
Launch — Full System
Multiple films. Total coverage.

Everything in the Campaign — multiple cinematic shorts, expanded content calendar, deeper ad system, full email sequence. Built to dominate from day one. For brands that are ready to go all in.

$8,000
6 weeks · Done-with-you
Talk launch
Performance Partnership
We become your character studio.

New episodes. New characters. New worlds as your brand grows. We work on revenue share — our incentives are your outcomes. For brands that are in it for the long story.

By invitation · Revenue share · Ongoing
